messages.content: Can you do push-ups?
Of course I can. It's straight fire! No cap, I can do 30 push-ups a minute.
Really? I think that's impossible!
You mean 30 push-ups?
Yeah!
It's easy, say less. If you grind exercise every day, you can clutch it too.
Can you study with the radio on?
Nah, I'm finna study with some background music instead. Radio's too mid for grinding.
What is the difference?
The radio's got way too many commercials interrupting the flow. It's straight dogwater when you're trying to focus, no cap.
That's true, but then you have to buy a record player.
Are you all right?
I'll be chillin'soon, no cap. I was lowkey shook when I watched them fall from the wire.
Don't worry. He is an acrobat.
Say less.
Frank's getting married, do you believe this?
No cap? That's wild.
Yes, he is. He loves the girl very much.
Yo that's fire, who's he marrying?
A girl he met on holiday in Spain, I think.
That's poggers. They got a date set for the wedding yet?
Not yet.
How are Zina's new programmers working out?
I hate to admit it, but they're cracked. And fast. The Filipino kid is goated, no cap.
So you'll make the Stars. com deadline, and have us up and running next week?
It'll be close, but we're finna clutch it.
Good. After Stars. com starts paying us, we won't need Vikam's cash anymore.
And if we don't need them, we won't need Zina either. Say less.
Do you like cooking?
Yeah no cap, I'm lowkey obsessed with cooking. Got into it when I was 12 and I've been grinding ever since.
Why do you like it?
Honestly I just vibe with it, you know? I like cooking solo and tasting the finished product when it hits different. There's something bussin'about that.
That's wonderful!
Right? And I'm always testing new recipes with my squad. You should pull up and let me cook for you sometime, bet.
Really? I hope I can have a chance to taste it. Don't forget to tell me.
Say less, I got you.
Anyone home? Jen!
I'm in the kitchen... let yourself in!
Wow! You're really working up a storm!
I know. I've been grinding hard no cap.
You look like a cooking show host--only messier.
You look so tan and healthy!
Thanks. I just got back from summer camp, no cap.
How was it?
Straight fire. I got to try so many things for the first time.
Like what?
I went sailing, fishing, and horseback riding. Lowkey bussin'.
I'm so jealous.
The counselors were goated too. It was the best summer ever. Except for all those mosquitoes clapping me up the whole time!
Diana, do you like the perfume I gave you?
It's fire, no cap. But lowkey I don't really wear perfume.
I'm sorry. I didn't know that.
All good, say less. Thanks for the thought though, I appreciate it.
Hi Bill, I saw your grandma yesterday.
Yo fr? Where was that?
I was running around the track at my college and there she was walking around the same track.
Grannie's lowkey goated when it comes to staying fit and healthy. She's always making us kids eat the proper foods, no cap.
Well, it pays off for her. How old is she anyway?
She finna be 86 next month.
That is truly amazing!
Dad, why are you taping the windows?
Honey, a typhoon is coming and we gotta board up before the storm circle hits.
Really? Wow, I don't have to go to school tomorrow.
Jenny, come and help, we need to rotate and prep more food for the rotation.
OK. Dad! I'm coming.
Hi, my name is Lean, and I'm from Russia.
Yo nice to meet you, Lean. I'm Alike, repping Japan no cap.
To me English is a difficult language.
Nah for real, learning a second language hits different. It's always tough.
True, but English is harder than most. It's a crazy language.
Crazy language? Say less, what makes it so dogwater?
One letter can have several pronunciations and one word can have several meanings.
Yo that's lowkey insane. No wonder you're saying English is mid like that.
Can I help you?
Yo I hope so. I'm grinding on this paper and I'm not sure where to drop for sources, you know?
I'll certainly try to help you. What topic is your paper on?
It's about how TV affects kids, no cap.

There are several possible sources you might use for that topic. I suggest you use the computer and the computer will give you a list of every scientific journal that talks about children and television.
Yo thanks for the clutch help, that's straight fire.
How do you like the pizza here?
Straight fire no cap. This pizza hits different.
Do you have a light?
Nah my bad, I don't smoke no cap.
I was scared stiff of giving my first performance.
Nah fr? Bro you understood the assignment, that performance was straight fire.
Thank you for your kindly words.
Excuse me. Could you please take a picture of us with this camera?
Bet. Which button do I press to shoot?
This one.
Aight, do I gotta aim it or what?
No, this is a focus-free camera. All you have to do is point and press the button.
Say less. Say cheese!
Every country should face the history.
Yeah, no cap we don't live in a vacuum. Every nation's got traditional values and a long, complex history that hits different.
Sometimes, we, human beings, really had done something wrong, so we should admit it at first.
True, but there's always gonna be someone trying to dogwater the real history and turn their back on it.
I believe such things won't be realized, just daydreaming.
Do you like traveling, Kathy?
I like traveling for pleasure to rotate to new spots for vacation, you know? But I don't like the grind of commuting to work, waiting for buses, or...
Or getting stuck in traffic jams when you're driving.
Periodt.
Your house is too small. Why not buy a big one.
Nah I wish I could stack enough V-Bucks for that, no cap.
You can get a loan from the bank. You know LPF program provides low cost loans for participants home purchases.
Yeah I know about that program, but don't you see house prices are cranking up crazy right now? It's lowkey getting out of hand.
How do you do, Prof. Smith.
Yo what's good, Ms. Yang. Your English is straight fire, no cap.
Thank you. I begin to like English even when I was a child.
That's poggers. Where'd you pick it up?
At school, in China. This is my first time to be out of my own country.
That's goated, honestly. Must hit different being out here for the first time.
What do you like to do in your spare time?
I'm lowkey obsessed with chess, no cap. It's straight fire.
Do you have any hobbies besides playing chess?
Nah that's pretty much it.
Do you have any hobbies like playing tennis or things like that?
Oh wait, my bad. I also vibe with basketball, that's goated.
Can you tell me why you like it?
Because that team aspect hits different, you know? I love running it with the squad and getting that W together.
Where is John? I can't find him anywhere.
Yo, haven't you heard? Bro got clapped and ended up in the pen.
What? Beg your pardon.
Yeah no cap, John's locked up. He got caught stealing and got sent to jail, no lie.
I just cann't believe my ears!
Can I help you?
Yo, I hope so no cap. I'm grinding on this paper about something and I'm lowkey lost on where to find the mats I need.
I'll certainly try to help you. What topic is your paper on?
My paper's about how television hits different on kids, you know?

There are several possible sources you might use for that topic. I suggest you use the computer and the computer will give you a list of every scientific journal that talks about children and television.
Yo thanks for the clutch help, fr fr.
Hey, Ted. What are you up to this Friday?
Yo, I got the day off from work, no cap.
That's great! Do you have any plans?
Nah, I've been grinding so hard lately, so I'm just gonna chill and let myself cook this weekend.
Sounds nice.
Yeah, finna stay in, vibe out, and catch some movies. Lowkey been needing this.
Can I stop by?
Bet, pull up whenever.
What do you plan to do for your birthday?
I'm finna have a picnic with my squad, Mum. No cap, it's gonna hit different.
How about a party at home? That way we can get together and celebrate it.
Bet, Mum. I'll rotate my friends over to the crib and we can catch a dub together.
Hi, Mary. You look pale today. What's the matter with you?
I think I've caught a cold, no cap. Right now I'm one-shot and aching all over.
You'd better take some medicine and have a good rest. I hope you'll be yourself pretty soon.
Thanks, I appreciate that. Yeah, I'm finna rotate to the doctor and get checked out.
I feel like going for a drink, it's been a long day.
Yo, no cap I could use a drink too. Let's get some minis and chill.
How about the new bar across road?
Bet, that spot is bussin'. The food there hits different too.
I agree, I had lunch there last week.
Straight fire, let's rotate over there and catch a dub.
Could you tell me the right time, please?
Yo, my watch says five past two. But nah, it's mid right now-been acting sus these last few days, losing and gaining time all over the place.
You have to go and fix it.
Yeah bet, I'm finna get that handled.
Hi, Mr. Wang. Do you feel like going boating with me?
Yo that sounds bussin', I haven't been out on the water in a minute. What time we talking?
How about tomorrow afternoon?
Bet, where should I rotate to meet you?
At the gate of the park.
Fire, I'm hyped to link up with you then.
See you then.
Say less, catch you then.
You look pale recently.
Yeah, no cap. Work's been grinding me down hard. I'm basically turtling at my desk all day, no time to rotate and chill.
Take good care of yourself.
Bet, I appreciate that. Finna take a break and let myself cook for a bit.
Hey, Maggy, Did you hear about David?
About David? Nah, I didn't catch wind of anything no cap.
You know, about David and his new boss.
Sorry, I'm not following you right now.
Well, I heard David has been fired.
Oh man, that's rough. Dude's a total goat when it comes to work ethic though, no lie.
What's wrong with him?
His nose is out of joint because we forgot to invite him to the party, no cap. Dude's lowkey shook about it.
What are you going to do for one year abroad, Tom?
Grind, grind, grind. I'm finna learn a lot no cap.
You are going to take courses?
Yeah. I'm gonna load up some university courses over there.
Sounds hard.
For sure, but I think it's probably the meta move, you know?
won't you get lonely?
Nah, I'm lowkey goated socially. I'll catch dubs making friends and I'll have mad extracurricular activities too. You know, like fencing, theater, all that stuff.
On, darn. The grocery store is closed.
Yeah, this one closes at ten. We could rotate to the 24-hour store on sixth, no cap.
Alright. We are out of everything.
I wish the store close to us was open 24-7. That would hit different, lowkey.
I know, our schedules are so weird. Sometimes, the little corner store is the only thing within walking distance that's open when we get home.
Yeah, and the prices there are straight dogwater, fr fr.
I know. Three dollars for milk.
Do you think they two will get married?
No cap, bet they're finna walk down the aisle.
I think so. Yes, they get along so well.
He's goated for her, straight fire match if you ask me.
You're right. He sure is.
How about going to the cinema tonight?
Yo that sounds fire. What's dropping tonight?
I am not sure about the name of the film, but I know it's a romantic one.
Romantic? Nah lowkey I'm more into thrillers, that's just me though.
Don't you think it's too bloody?
Nah fam, that's what makes it bussin'. Gets me hyped every time.
I feel so uncomfortable.
Yo, you cracked or something?
No. The teacher is dragging the chalk over the blackboard. It set my teeth on edge.
He'll finish writing in a minute, no cap. Just hold it down.
Oh, no!
That's dogwater, no cap.
Look at the view from the window.
Bro that view is straight up mid. Not what I was expecting at all.
It's awful, isn't it?
Honestly I can't even look at it anymore. Big yikes, I'm lowkey let down.
It Can't be helped.
What do you do in your free time, Nancy?
Yo, I'm lowkey obsessed with playing the violin.
Really? How long have you been playing the violin?
About ten years now, no cap. Started grinding it back in middle school.
That's really interesting.
For real. So what about you? You got any hobbies you're into?
Well, I like collecting matchbox! I'm not sure if that counts, though.
Nah that definitely counts, bet. Everyone's got their own loadout when it comes to hobbies.
How can I tell her about this?
Nah you got this, no cap. You'll clutch it and find a way.
There is no need to be so frustrated.
Real talk though, how you finna survive without a job in the future? That's lowkey a skill issue.
Don't worry, you'll find a way.
Good luck on your test tomorrow. We'll be crossing our fingers for you!
Appreciate it, no cap. Finna clutch this exam.
I'll never ever work together with him!
Yo what went down? Y'all beefing again?
Will you take my materials back from him for me? Please!
Nah say less, I'm not tryna get caught up in your drama, that's on you.
Is the clock right?
Nah no cap, it's running a little fast.
By how many minutes?
Two.
How old are you?
Nine... but I'm finna be ten on May 1st. When's your birthday?
I'm older than you! I'll be ten on April 14th.
Yo, you finna throw a birthday party or what?
Maybe. I'll have to ask my mother.
It smells like an ashtray in here!
Yo, what's up? Why you looking so shook right now?
What's wrong? I thought we agreed that you were gonna quit smoking.
Nah, I said I was finna cut down, that's different no cap. You can't just expect me to go cold turkey overnight, that's a skill issue!

Look, there are other ways to quit. You can try the nicotine patch, or nicotine chewing gum. We spend a fortune on cigarettes every month and now laws are cracking down and not allowing smoking in any public place. It's not like you can just light up like before.

I know, I know. I'm trying but I don't got the willpower to just dip, no cap. I can't fight the urge to grab my smokes in the morning with coffee or after lunch! Please understand, this hits different.
Fine! I want a divorce!
Why are you shivering?
Bro it's cold, I'm one-shot on health fr.
It seems that you get antsy when you hear I praise another guy.
I get antsy not because you praise a guy, but because you may get clapped by a guy like him, no cap.
How come you think of him that way?
Because you seem to have lost your vigilance. You gotta stay on high alert and keep your guard up.
I have no reason to distrust him. He's never caused any harm.
Nah but isn't there something sus about him?
Nothing smells a rat. I told you that he's an all-right guy.
All-right guy? Say less. Let's just rotate to something else instead.
Cheese! It tastes like cardboard.
Yeah that cheese is straight dogwater no cap. Probably why it's hitting different price-wise.
Have you signed up to join the company's Christmas party?
Yeah, I'm already locked in. You finna come through?
I will. You know, as a newcomer, I think it might be a good opportunity to get to know people from the other departments of our company in a more relaxed atmosphere.
No cap, our company's Christmas party is always straight fire for everyone to chill and connect with each other. It's a clutch time to make new friends and network with people across the board.
I hope that it is not a formal one when the boss is there.

Nah it's gonna be lowkey and fun, no sweat vibes at all. You're gonna love the game show they got planned. Just dress casual and you're good. Fair warning though-there's gonna be mad drinks, so pace yourself.
Don't worry, I can handle that. And I know if the boss is there, even it is an informal evening, it does not make a good impression to get totally drunk in front of him.
If the weatherman's predictions are accurate, it should rain tomorrow.
Nah that would be dogwater. We'd have to rotate our baseball game to another day for sure.
hi, Emily, do you know that guy over there?
The tall one? Yeah that's Drive, he works with Lily no cap.
He is cute. What dose he do?
Honestly not sure, I think he's a manager or something.
Really? Are you going to introduce us?
Nah he's already taken bro, that's his wife right there. Skill issue on that one.
You didn't ring me last night. You said you would.
My bad, no cap. I really let you down there.
That's all right. But why were you so rude to me at lunch.
Was I? Honestly my bad, I didn't mean to clap back like that. I apologize for real.
And why are you yarning now? Are you bored?
Nah I'm just lowkey exhausted, that's all. Forgive me.
There will be a parade to celebrate National Day this weekend.
Yo what's the rotation?
From Zhongshan Circus to City Bank.
Man, if only I could catch that dub with you!
Excuse me. I'm afraid you're in my seat. You've moved my books.
Aw man, my bad.
You must have realized somebody was here.
Nah fr, I looked around and there was no other spot open. I waited for a bit and nobody showed up, so I just posted up. My bad if I took your loadout spot though.
I'm going to Japan this year on vacation.
Yo that's fire, have you ever rotated to America though?
No, but I'd really like to.
Nah you'd vibe with it for sure, no cap.
Could I see the manager please? I have a complaint to make.
Yo, I'm the manager here. What's good, what can I help you with?
Did you have the room checked before we move in?
Which room you posted up in?
1808. The toilet doesn't work properly, the water doesn't run in the shower.
Aw man, that's big yikes. Say less, I'ma handle that right now, no cap.
Congratulations, Vivian. You won the grand prize, again.
Yo no cap, I understood the assignment! I knew I was finna clutch this one!
You did? How? Did you wear red underwear again this year?
That and way more, bet!
Tell me! Tell me! What's your secret?!
Aight, aight, I'll drop the loot for you, but you gotta promise to keep it on the low!
What?! You did that??!!!
We are going to the concert this evening. Will you join us.
Nah no cap, I can't make it.
Why not?
I've been boxed in with work since my boss is away on business. Got too much on my plate right now.
You'v been work here for nearly a month, how do you feel about the job?
Not bad, no cap. Thanks for the help though. I'm lowkey grinding hard at this job, so I'm feeling a bit one-shot energy-wise.
I had the same feeling when I first came to work here. but after a period of time, I feel better, I am sure you'll get used to this busy job.
Yeah I'm noticing the work efficiency here is straight fire. And yo, you got some serious skill and professional game-it's like you understood the assignment from day one, that's bussin'!
You know the phrase, the survival the fittest. We have no choices.
For real, I gotta keep grinding and clutch this out.
The music is on. May I have the pleasure to dance with you?
My bad, I'm locked in for the foxtrot right now. Can we rotate to the next dance instead?
Certainly.
Look at this headline, Soo Mi.
Yo, no cap? That's wild how many people in the United States are getting divorced!
Is it the same in Korea?
Nah, I don't think so. In Korea some marriages break up, but most couples stay locked in together.
Do people get married young?
Not really, lowkey. Very few people are getting married before they hit 20.
Hmm. Do women usually work after they get married?
Nah, a lot of women stay home and grind taking care of their families. But some still work, say less.
Boy! What a beauty! I fall in love with her at the first sight.
The beauty under the tree, no cap?
Of course. No girl is more charming.
Yo that's a dude though, lowkey a big yikes.
Excuse me. Where do I register?
Oh, that POI is over there in Pacific Pavilion.
Is that the large, white building?
Yep, that's the one no cap.
Thanks.
How was your education going on in Australia?
I'm finna graduate this summer, no cap.
Where are you going to work then, in Australia or back in China?
I'm planning to rotate back to China after graduation.
Why are you choosing to leave a foreign country? Many people are reluctant to leave the superior living environment abroad.
Honestly, I think personal development hits different compared to just having a superior living environment. Growth is the real dub.
Yeah, China's developing so fast and development opportunities can be found almost in every corner of the country.
Do you have any particular hobbies, Tom?
Oh, yeah. I love playing badminton, table tennis and computer games. But honestly, gaming's become my main loadout, no cap.
I hear many teenagers will spend hours and hours sitting at computers. And they don't care about their own health at all. How about you?
Nah, I'm lowkey the same way. People say it's dogwater to sit in front of a screen all day, but I think it's actually pretty stimulating.
You won't play online games full of violence, will you?
Every now and then, yeah.
It's no good. And I think spending several hours each day playing computer games is a waste of time. You might as well do something healthy and meaningful.
You're right, I'm finna work on my self-control for real this time.
Who's that old lady trimming the trees?
That's my grandma, no cap.
She's looks very healthy. How old is she?
92, she's still cracked.
Mom. My legs are killing me.
Hold up, we're finna clutch this right now. You'll be good in a sec.
Oh, man. I had the best supper last night. My wife made a stir-fry and it was amazing!

Yo that sounds straight fire! Crispy bitesize vegetables covered in soy sauce and oyster sauce, wilted greens, fresh bean sprouts. Throw in some onion, garlic, and ginger? That hits different no cap. It's almost lunchtime and I'm lowkey starving for a plate like that right now!
Well, you can keep the vegetables, I'll take the meat. The stir fry my wife made was really hearty, with chunks of beef and slivers of bell peppers and onion...

Nah nah nah, hold up. More meat than vegetables? That's dogwater stir fry energy right there. You're disrespecting the wok she cooked it in! That ain't even a real stir fry, that's basically a fajita without the wrap. Big yikes on that take periodt.
What did you say?
I said it's a lovely day, no cap. Why don't we rotate and go for a walk?
Well, I feel a little tired.
Come on! A little movement hits different for your health, trust me.
Then can you wait a few minutes? I want to finish writing this letter.
Say less, but don't take too long. It would be dogwater to waste weather this good.
I won't be long. No more than ten minutes. Why don't you go ahead and I'll meet you in the park?
Bet, I'll go ahead. Look for me near the lake and we'll catch that dub.
Thank god you showed up when you did! He's insane! Do you think we should call the police?
Don't worry about it, I'll call my friend and have him take care of it. No cap, I Can't believe he was stalking you all these years. What a nut job!
I know! Well... he said I'm not pregnant. I'm sorry if I got you all worked up over nothing. I want you to know that I didn't do it on purpose...

Don't apologize! From the moment I met you, not a day has gone by when I haven't thought of you. And now that I'm with you again, I'm... I'm just shook, Veronica. The closer I get to you, the worse it gets. The thought of not being with you, I mean, I just Can't handle it! We were made for each other, Veronica. You are my everything, my soul mate. Say less, what can I do?
Just hold me... I'll always be here for you, no matter what. And together, we can tackle whatever life throws at us. I believe in us, steven.
I'm so happy to hear that! I knew we belong together. I love you so much, no cap.
Zina, can I talk to you about something personal?
Say less, as long as it doesn't take too long.
My boyfriend says I work too much. That I spend more time with you than with him.
Was he shook when you told him you had to dip this weekend?
He said not to bother coming back. And I said, fine, I won't.
So what's the issue then, no cap?
So the company decided to cancel your trip to Hong Kong?
Yeah, the SARS epidemic is still not under control no cap. So I'm finna play it safe and not risk it.
Maybe it's a good things. If you don't have to go to Hong Kong, you can take a break and take things easy for a while.
Nah you're right. We should probably rotate to a fitness plan and start grinding more exercise. Sitting in the office all day is dogwater for staying in shape.
That's a good idea. Let's see if we can get more people in this plan. There isn't much business these days anyway, so I think many people will be interested.
Which pair of jeans do you like best?
Nah I'm lowkey vibing with the straight legs, no cap.
But they aren't very fashionable. What about these?
Nah those hit different in a bad way, they sag too much. I feel like I got plumber butt in them, straight up botted fit.
That's the style! You just wear boxers.
But what if someone decides to box me like a fish and just yanks them down? That's the real issue.
You're so old fashioned! Nobody is going to pull down your pants!
Bro, wearing those is literally asking to get clapped. It's a whole vibe I'm not trying to catch.
Happy anniversary, sweetheart!
Yo, here's to our first anniversary and many more dubs to come. Cheers!
I'll drink to that. Thanks for making this a night worth remembering.
For real though, it's a special day. They say if you clutch the first year, the rest hits different.
That's good to know. Oh, listen! The band's playing our song.
I requested it, no cap. What do you say? You got your dancing shoes ready to go?
Always.
What do you plan to do for your birthday?
Yo I'm finna hot drop a picnic with my squad, Mum. Should be straight fire.
How about a party at home? That way we can get together and celebrate it.
Bet, Mum. I'll send out the invites to my boys and we'll rotate home to celebrate.
How about seconds, Victor?
Nah I'm good, already got my shields topped off.
Why don't you have dinner with me tonight?
Bet, I'm down for that no cap.
Let's say about 6:00?
Say less, 6 works for me.
Cigarette?
Oh, uh... Thanks. Henry, you got a light? No cap I'm lowkey out.
Sorry, here.
Appreciate it. Beautiful day out here, ngl. Just sucks I'm stuck on duty right now.
I'll stand in with you if you like. I've got nothing else to do.
Nah fr, I couldn't ask you to do that. Say less though, I got it handled.
How about going to hear a country-and-western singer tonight?
Yo that sounds bussin', I'm down for it.
I'll pick you up around 8: 00.
Bet, I'll be ready. See you then.
The mosquitos are biting me!
Yo same, I can't stop scratching. They're everywhere no cap! These sneaky little bots are relentless.
Do you have any bug spray?
Nah, I botted that and forgot to grab some.
Then we'll have to put up with it.
We can cover ourselves with beer! That way if they bite us, they'll get drunk and clapped before they even know what hit 'em.
That's without a doubt, the best idea you've had! Let's do it!
Run! They're thirsty for more and finna box us in!
Stop running around in front of the TV, will you? Why don't you just sit and watch?
I've tried, but I can't stand that bald guy yelling so loud in the program, no cap.
Then stay away. No one is keeping you from doing that.
Don't be so heated, man. I just don't vibe with the program, that's all.
All right, I will explain it to you later on. Now scram.
Say less. I'll let you cook and catch your W, no problem.
That's exactly what I want, thank you.
Okay, can I ask you something direct?
Ha! You've never been one to turtle and play it safe, no cap.
Fair enough. Give it to me straight. Did she bully you into this?
Nah for real... I'm actually cracked about this.
I tell ya, when I got the invite, it really threw me for a loop. You've done a complete 180.
I know, I know. But things have rotated. I guess I've finally let him cook and settled down.
I guess so.
My daughter plans to quit her present job and wants to find another. She says she wants to get a better job with higher pay.
Nah that's straight fire honestly. That's lowkey what I'm tryna do too, no cap.
But what about settling down to start a family? Doesn't anyone want to get married any more?
It hits different now, you know? The world's changing up. Some of my homies don't feel that pressure to lock in just yet. We're all just waiting to let things cook naturally, periodt.
What time is the right moment?

Honestly, just let the universe rotate it into place instead of forcing the play. We're all about that organic love, say less. The main thing is staying happy-the rest will come through when it's meant to. That's the meta we're on.
Please excuse me, but I really have to be going.
Bet, no problem. It was clutch seeing you.
It was nice to see you, too. And please give my regards to Mrs. Robbins.
Excuse me. Is this seat taken?
Yeah no cap, that seat's already claimed.
What do you think of the coming match?
Nah catching a dub in this one's gonna be easy no cap. I'm feeling cracked right now.
